pokemon:perrserker.name: Perrserker
pokemon:perrserker.summary: After many battles, it evolved dangerous claws that come together to form daggers when extended.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: After many battles, it evolved dangerous claws that come together to form daggers when extended.
What appears to be an iron helmet is actually hardened hair. This Pokémon lives for the thrill of battle.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: After many battles, it evolved dangerous claws that come together to form daggers when extended.
